untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting CPR role transition (resistance to support) which requires multi-bar state tracking and pattern recognition not expressible with single-bar indicators and allowed operators. CPR (Central Pivot Range) is a custom indicator derived from pivot points that requires historical context and phase detection beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot and s1 (support 1) levels as proxies for CPR support/resistance dynamics, but the core requirement of detecting role reversal (resistance becoming support) cannot be reliably expressed with allowed operators. The signal fundamentally requires state machine logic or custom indicator calculations for proper CPR transition detection.
